event_field_paths.SOT_caveat: StatsBomb 'Blocked' = blocked by defender; Opta excludes blocked from SOT. Pick a convention and hold it.
event_field_paths.corners: type.name=='Pass' AND pass.type.name=='Corner'; team.name; period (NOT a top-level type)
event_field_paths.cards: foul_committed.card.name (from fouls) + bad_behaviour.card.name (non-foul, e.g. dissent); values Yellow Card/Second Yellow/Red Card; team.name; period
event_field_paths.offsides: type.name=='Pass' AND pass.outcome.name=='Pass Offside' (~5/match); team credited = team CAUGHT offside (the passing/attacking team). NOT a top-level 'Offside' type.
event_field_paths.goals: type.name=='Shot' AND shot.outcome.name=='Goal' (or use match half scores)

half_split.field: period (1=1H, 2=2H, 3/4=extra time, 5=shootout); minute also present on all events
half_split.recommendation: bucket by PERIOD (clean); for 2H use period==2; decide ET (3/4) handling for knockouts; exclude shootout (5)

buildability.corner_half_split_CORNER_HALF_SHRINK: BUILDABLE (corners per half; 314 matches >> enough for a universal constant)
buildability.goals_half_split_H1_SHARE: BUILDABLE (goals per half; re-confirm the 0.44 on real intl data)
buildability.offsides_predictability_gate: PARTIAL (per-team offsides derivable, but NO odds here for favorite_gap; low volume)
buildability.fouls_tendency: PARTIAL (universal half-split YES; team-specific minnow tendency NO - minnows absent from these tournaments)

hard_limits: NO ODDS in StatsBomb - calibration/structure corpus only; favorite_gap features come from live market / club corpus, not here
Selected tournaments only (WC/Copa/AFCON/Euro), not qualifiers or minnow full histories - universal half-split YES, minnow team-tendency NO
Cannot help: anything odds-dependent to FIT here, or team-specific tendencies for non-tournament teams (Haiti etc. absent)
bottom_line: Free StatsBomb open data is ENOUGH to calibrate the half-split STRUCTURE wing (CORNER_HALF_SHRINK, H1_SHARE, 1H/2H SOT-cards-corners-goals) on 314 real international matches with clean period bucketing and confirmed field paths. Still needs a paid intl source (Opta/Sportmonks) ONLY for team-specific minnow tendencies - which the API-Football probe already showed is sparse for those teams anyway.
